calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-23-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Heather Volante (specially appearing for Milton Katz) for Benjamin Sauceda.

Ms. Volante argued that Mr. Katz had already reduced his fees, that he had some unusual work researching a lost heir, that there was a "rubber stamp" issue which caused additional work/research, that the creditor's claim by Matt Taylor of $60,000.00 was complicated, that there were 22 pages of invoices to make his way through, that he had to remove Matt Taylor from the premises, that because Mr. Taylor did not vacate the premises the sale fell through, and that Mr. Katz had to do an ex-parte to remove him. At the conclusion of argument, the matter was taken under submission.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy Sum.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
